name: European Defence Stack
description: Public-source map of European defence industry, capability layers, bottlenecks and opportunity zones.

name: Policy / Funding / Procurement Layer
description: EU, NATO and national funding/procurement structures shaping defence demand.

name: Defence Prime Layer
description: Major European defence primes and system integrators.

name: Land Systems Layer
strategic_role: Armoured vehicles, artillery and land platforms
description: Tanks, armoured vehicles, artillery, ground robotics and land platform modernization.

name: Air Combat Layer
strategic_role: Combat aircraft and collaborative air systems
description: Combat aircraft, FCAS/SCAF, Eurofighter, Rafale, air combat cloud and loyal wingman concepts.

name: Naval Systems Layer
description: Surface combatants, submarines, naval combat systems, maritime surveillance and lifecycle support.

name: Missiles / Air Defence Layer
description: Missiles, interceptors, air defence, deep strike and force protection systems.

name: C4ISR / Sensors Layer
description: Command, control, communications, computers, intelligence, surveillance, reconnaissance, sensors and battlefield management.

name: Cyber / Electronic Warfare Layer
description: Cybersecurity, electronic warfare, signals intelligence, spectrum monitoring, secure systems and resilience.

name: Space / Secure Connectivity Layer
description: Satcom, ISR, navigation, PRS, secure connectivity, space situational awareness and maritime RF intelligence.

name: Drones / Autonomy Layer
description: Uncrewed aerial systems, ground robotics, autonomous ISR, counter-UAS and autonomy software.

name: Ammunition / Energetics Layer
description: Munitions, propellants, explosives, energetics, missile motors and production capacity.

name: Industrial Supply Chain Layer
description: Components, semiconductors, machine tools, raw materials, workforce, certification, test ranges and production ramp-up.

name: Simulation / Training Layer
description: Simulation, digital twins, training systems, mission rehearsal and test/evaluation tooling.

name: Defence AI / Software Layer
description: AI, data fusion, autonomy, targeting assistance, battle management, secure deployment and decision support.
